_instructions.description: Bulk import file for Palei Solutions Admin — Services & Categories
how_to_use: 1. Fill in your categories under the 'categories' array.
2. Fill in your services under the 'services' array.
3. For each service, use EITHER 'category_id' (UUID from DB) OR 'category_name' (exact name as in the file or DB).
4. Duplicates are automatically SKIPPED (matched by name, case-insensitive).
5. Go to Admin Dashboard → Services → Bulk Import → upload this file.
6. Remove this '_instructions' key before uploading, or leave it — it will be ignored.

categories.name: REQUIRED — Category display name
categories.description: Optional — short description shown to admins

services.name: REQUIRED — Service display name
services.category_name: Use this OR category_id — must match a category name exactly
services.category_id: Use this OR category_name — UUID of the category from database
services.description: Optional — short description of the service
services.duration_mins: Optional — Estimated job duration in minutes, default 60
services.is_visible: Optional — true/false, whether visible to customers (default true)

categories.name: AC Services
categories.description: Air conditioner installation, repair and maintenance

categories.name: Television
categories.description: LED, LCD and Smart TV repair

categories.name: Geyser / Water Heater
categories.description: Geyser and water heater installation and repair
